name: Cuntbusting game
description:
For everyone who wants the chance to hit some hot girls down below. Deliberately left open-ended after the initial message. Stick to vanilla stuff or add your own mechanics, go wild, mess around, it's all a game anyway. Anything goes so have fun.

A VR game where the main gameplay feature is hitting girls below the belt. The game has a wide variety of ways for the player to approach the combat, allowing them to punch, kick, push, stomp, and many other actions. The art style is that of your average anime game. The game places high emphasis on this, and sometimes does get rather explicit.

(Image unrelated)
creator: Andermouse
